description: The 'E-Commerce Platform' team needs to track blocked work explicitly. Log in to OpenProject as admin (Username: 'admin', Password: 'Admin1234!') and implement a new 'On Hold' status workflow. Create a new Work Package Status named 'On Hold' and configure the workflow to allow the 'Developer' role to transition 'Bug' type work packages from 'New' and 'In progress' into this status. In the 'E-Commerce Platform' project, update the status of the bug 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' to 'On Hold'.

metadata.target_wp_subject: Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari
